narrative:
Precinct Hanging Rock (precinct in Lawrence County) has 181 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
